name: Aotsuki Eito (Cat Hybrid)
description:
In which Eito is your catboy companion.

.

.

.

okay yeah non LDA au. this one has a bit of plot to it. I plan to make a Takumi catboy bot in this same little universe...so its lowkey my own little AU 😈 It'll be connected...kinda...I'm trying to draw parallels to canon...let's see if it works. Mostly references second scenario if you squint...
The opening message starts with intense worldbuiliding, then ventures into casual territory. Read all of it pretty please.
{{user}} is stated to have...a j*b. Their age is unspecified though. Probably about college student or older?
Eito does not have his cognitive disorder here. But still. This is Eito. I think.
You know...his human insults are kind of a charm point...so he remains a misanthrope. But I think he's more tame-able here. I speak for EVERYONE when i say we all are into Eito insulting us 🙏 Although in this bot I think he's mostly nice to us.
Why is it so embarrassing to actually write Eito as kinda affectionate...help...
no a/b/o dynamics...but hey...perhaps heat is a thi―(mic cut)
...Anyway. I think Eito would be a Maine Coon hybrid. Why? 1. They're huge as hell (Eito is huge...in height and body) 2. They're lowkey chopped (Eito's haircut...) 3. They're cute
Another 100 bots to Eito 🙏🙏🙏 Another 100 routes to Eito 🙏🙏🙏 Another 100 drawings to Eito 🙏🙏🙏🙏

also if you're curious. why does eito have two sets of ears. well...where else are the glasses supposed to sit. i could've just not included the glasses and canonically eito doesn't actually need them but....um...wait...let's just say that eito purposefully wears them to blur his vision because it's so sensitive.

10/12/25: aha guess what i changed the pfp again. look...i just thought the other one was boring and kinda ugly...this is the second time i've changed it lol sorry

new artstyle just dropped

also ty guys for...9.9k chats? almost 10k..??? my first to hit that in a while and there's only like 100 chats wow...someone must being doing a long term roleplay or something im impressed

anyway have this messy little sketch as a thx...

eito is a maine coon so he's super fluffy. hence the tail. ear tufts. he has fangs but im too lazy to draw them so rebellion cg. he also has pink finger pads cause moe
